title: SleepWarp
description: Accelerates time when sleeping instead of skipping directly to day.
body:
[![Fabric Mod](https://img.shields.io/badge/modloader-fabric-informational)](https://fabricmc.net/use/) [![Curseforge Download](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/full_579295_downloads.svg)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sleep-warp/files/all) [![Modrinth Download](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/sleep-warp?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/sleep-warp/versions) [![GitHub Download](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/giggitybyte/sleepwarp/total?logo=github)](https://github.com/Giggitybyte/SleepWarp/releases)
**v2**: [Minecraft 1.20.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/sleep-warp/version/l4cnghUz), [Minecraft 1.19.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/sleep-warp/version/7jftC09h), [Minecraft 1.19.2](https://modrinth.com/mod/sleep-warp/version/qQz3TTeH)
**v1**: [Minecraft 1.19](https://modrinth.com/mod/sleep-warp/version/RFPkbUfX), [Minecraft 1.18.2](https://modrinth.com/mod/sleep-warp/version/2yO8inuL), [Minecraft 1.17.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/sleep-warp/version/e4tz8uOh), [Minecraft 1.16.5](https://modrinth.com/mod/sleep-warp/version/Quw7W3QE)
*Make sure to download [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl/versions?l=fabric) (YACL) if you want to access SleepWarp v2 settings from ModMenu!* For versions newer than MC 1.20.1, check out the fork of my mod, [SleepWarp Updated](https://modrinth.com/mod/sleep-warp-updated) (maintained by [Patbox](https://modrinth.com/user/Patbox))

This mod will accelerate time while you sleep instead of skipping directly to day.
When installed on a multiplayer server, the acceleration speed will scale based on the number of players asleep. ![Sleep Demo](https://i.imgur.com/YzjUttT.gif) The world will also be ticked at the same rate to simulate the passage of time (configurable) ![Furnace Demo](https://i.imgur.com/FOPXyeW.gif) ![Growing Demo](https://i.imgur.com/MkCx1rb.gif) SleepWarp can be used in either a single player, LAN, or dedicated server environment (not required on the client)
